key_finding: v2=4 過大表現は遷移行列の固有構造ではなく軌道の不変測度の非一様性に起因

transition_independence.description: mod 2^k → ∞ で遷移は完全独立（幾何分布）に収束

mechanism.primary: Syracuse orbit invariant measure non-uniformity mod 32
mechanism.secondary: n=5 → 1 path contributes systematically to v2=4

algebraic_structure.convergence_rate: Frobenius norm halves roughly per 2 increments of k
algebraic_structure.tail_effect: mod 2^k truncation creates apparent Markov dependency that vanishes in limit
